title: Manage pastures for livestock production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Manage pastures for livestock production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess pasture and property for livestock production

pcs.text: Assess pasture types on property and seasonal production potential and limitations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess pasture types on property and seasonal production potential and limitations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess pasture types on property and seasonal production potential and limitations.

pcs.text: Confirm or modify livestock production and workplace objectives to develop production targets achievable for pasture type
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm or modify livestock production and workplace objectives to develop production targets achievable for pasture type?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm or modify livestock production and workplace objectives to develop production targets achievable for pasture type.

pcs.text: Assess grazing and rest period requirements of pasture type
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess grazing and rest period requirements of pasture type?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess grazing and rest period requirements of pasture type.

pcs.text: Assess nutrient and soil biological requirements for pastures to determine fertiliser and amelioration program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess nutrient and soil biological requirements for pastures to determine fertiliser and amelioration program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess nutrient and soil biological requirements for pastures to determine fertiliser and amelioration program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess pasture and property for livestock production

elements.title: Develop a pasture management program

pcs.text: Determine objectives and milestones for pasture production and in doing so, consider the role of technology in improving efficiencies

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine objectives and milestones for pasture production and in doing so, consider the role of technology in improving efficiencies.

pcs.text: Determine water demand and availability for each soil type and pasture species

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine water demand and availability for each soil type and pasture species.

pcs.text: Identify and plan grazing and fodder conservation strategies

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and plan grazing and fodder conservation strategies.

pcs.text: Determine infrastructure and resources required to support grazing management

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine infrastructure and resources required to support grazing management.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and account for budgetary constraints according to financial plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document pasture management program according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Implement pasture management program

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and apply fertiliser and soil amelioration according to fertiliser and amelioration program.
